DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT YARA JIANG'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED, FOR REASONS SET FORTH IN DEFENDANT YARA JIANG'S MOVING PAPERS. THERE IS NO RECORD THAT PLAINTIFF FRANK CHU OPPOSES THIS MOTION. IT IS HEREBY ORDERED THAT WITHIN FIFTEEN (15) DAYS OF THE SIGNED ORDER ON THIS MOTION: (1) PLAINTIFF CHU SHALL PROVIDE VERIFIED RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTION, TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET NO. 1; (2) PLAINTIFF CHU SHALL PROVIDE VERIFIED RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTION, TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET NO. 1; (3) PLAINTIFF CHU SHALL PROVIDE VERIFIED RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTION, TO DEFENDANT'S DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION, SET NO. 1, AND PRODUCE ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS, THE COURT FURTHER AWARDS MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF CHU IN THE AMOUNT OF $420.00, TO BE PAID WITHIN FIFTEEN (15) DAYS OF THE SIGNED ORDER ON THIS MOTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO-TEM: KATHERINE HUIBONHOA, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating, Evidentiary, Issue Preclusion And Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $420 As Against Plaintiff And Plaintiff'S Counsel Of Record
Off Calendar Jun-05-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopted the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT YARA JIANG's Motion For Terminating, Evidentiary, Issue Preclusion And Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $420 As Against Plaintiff And Plaintiff's Counsel Of Record is off calendar per request of the moving party. Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca Woodson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Mar-14-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. HUNTER SIMS III OF THE STRATMAN, PATTERSON & HUNTER, TEL. NO. (510) 457-3468 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT YARA JIANG'S Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories is Granted, for reasons set forth in defendant Yara Jiang's moving papers. There is no record that plaintiff Frank Chu opposes this motion. It is hereby ordered that within fifteen (15) days of the signed Order on this motion: (1) plaintiff Chu shall provide verified responses, without objection, to Form Interrogatories, Set No. 1; (2) plaintiff Chu shall provide verified responses, without objection, to Special Interrogatories, Set No. 1; (3) plaintiff Chu shall provide verified responses, without objection, to defendant's Demand for Production, Set No. 1, and produce all responsive documents, The Court further awards monetary sanctions against plaintiff Chu in the amount of $420.00, to be paid within fifteen (15) days of the signed Order on this motion. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro-tem: Katherine Huibonhoa, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not Reported. =302/JPT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2014 Set For Trial On Dec-01-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
